name: skrrt-plugins
description: Agent skills by skrrt-sh — documentation, developer workflows, and productivity tools

plugins.name: md-writer
plugins.description: Write well-structured markdown with YAML frontmatter, Mermaid diagrams, and markdownlint validation

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Create conventional commits with gitmojis, open PRs or MRs, and publish releases with the matching forge CLI

plugins.name: squad
plugins.description: Decompose, fan out, and merge: squad plans a multi-subagent run, dispatches forked or named children in isolated git worktrees, and cherry-picks their commits onto an integration branch ready for /ship:commit
